title: Cobblemon Fire
body:
This is a Cobblemon modpack made for a server with friends. Anyone can play it although you would have to install the datapacks used on the server yourself to play single player.

This modpack includes the best addons to cobblemon such as:
- Cobblemon: Mega Showdown
- Cobbreeding
- SimpleTMs
- Cobblemon Fight or Flight
- CobblemonRider
- And Many More

Talk with your friends with Simple Voice Chat and experience enhanced world generation from Terralith and Tectonic!
